ma_number.description: The unique MA number identifier for this award (e.g. MA000002)

award_name.description: Full official name of the Modern Award (e.g. Clerks—Private Sector Award 2020)

award_code.description: Short code for the award (e.g. clerks, hospitality, retail)

last_amended.description: Date of most recent FWC amendment (e.g. 23 January 2026)

last_amended_pr.description: FWC PR number(s) for most recent variation (e.g. PR794703)

source_url.description: URL of the source FWC consolidated award PDF

source_type.description: Type of source document this data was extracted from

extracted_at.description: ISO date this record was extracted/built

part_number.description: Part number within the award (e.g. 1, 2, 4, or 'Schedule')

part_title.description: Title of the Part (e.g. Wages and Allowances)

clause_title.description: Title of the clause (e.g. Minimum rates, Penalty rates, Overtime)

clause_type.description: Standardised type category for this clause — enables cross-award filtering

is_schedule.description: True if this record is from a Schedule (A, B, C...) rather than a numbered clause

schedule_identifier.description: Schedule letter if applicable (e.g. A, B, C)

full_text.description: Complete verbatim text of this clause/section as extracted from the award

key_rates.description: Structured rate entries extracted from this clause (if it contains pay rates)

key_penalties.description: Structured penalty/loading entries (if clause contains penalty rates)

key_allowances.description: Structured allowance entries (if clause contains allowances)

casual_loading_percent.description: Casual loading percentage if stated in this clause (typically 25)

effective_date.description: Date from which rates/conditions in this clause are effective

variation_history.description: PR variation references shown in the award for this clause (e.g. [Varied by PR786540 ppc 01Jul25])

notes.description: Any notes, NOTEs from the clause, or important caveats

cross_references.description: Other clauses or schedules referenced by this clause

applies_to_employment_types.description: Employment types this clause applies to

searchable_keywords.description: Comma-separated keywords for full-text search (award name, clause type, industry, key terms)
